full_prompt: Design a monolithic 7075-T6 aluminum front-left steering upright (knuckle) for a collegiate formula-class racecar benchmark 2026 Class 1 CV vehicle running FS Rules 2026 base and FSEast Handbook 2026 v0.3 (Hungaroring high-speed slick-tire event format). The upright is a single billet-machined 7075-T6 part (no welds, no bolted gussets, no inserts; integral brake caliper tabs + integral ball-joint stubs). Geometry: central bearing bore 60 mm ID x 45 mm axial length for wheel-bearing cartridge, upper A-arm ball-joint boss 25 mm hemispherical seat at 150 mm above bearing centerline and 30 mm forward, lower A-arm ball-joint boss 28 mm hemispherical seat at 150 mm below bearing centerline and 35 mm rearward (defining a 17.5 deg kingpin inclination and 8 mm mechanical trail at the contact patch), steering arm boss 180 mm above ground (100 mm ahead of bearing centerline) with a 10 mm through-bore for the tie-rod rod-end, two integral brake-caliper mounting tabs 15 mm thick spaced 52 mm inboard-outboard each with M10 (11 mm clearance) holes matching a Brembo P32 4-pot caliper inner plate (102 mm bolt spacing), the pair located 60 mm aft of the bearing centerline at 100 mm below the upper ball joint. Overall bounding envelope 180 x 100 x 340 mm. Material 7075-T6 (E 71.7 GPa, nu 0.33, density 2810 kg/m^3, yield 503 MPa, UTS 572 MPa, endurance 159 MPa at 5e8 cycles). Vehicle data: 260 kg + 68 kg driver = 328 kg, 50% front = 164 kg front axle, 82 kg per front wheel; tire loaded radius 230 mm; FSEast lateral load event on slick compound at Hungaroring allows 2.0g sustained lateral + 2.5g combined peak (slick tire + FSEast event allowance). Three load cases. Load Case 1 (sustained 2.0g cornering outboard wheel): vertical 1608 N (2.0g on 82 kg), lateral 1608 N outboard at tire contact, longitudinal 482 N braking (0.6g partial), moments reacted at ball joints and steering arm. Load Case 2 (peak brake + turn-in 2.5g): vertical 1608 N, lateral 2010 N, longitudinal 2010 N (1g brake at turn-in). Load Case 3 (curb strike): 8 kN horizontal inboard at the wheel centre, reacted at both ball-joint bosses. Pass/fail: (R1) under LC1 sustained cornering, peak von Mises must not exceed 252 MPa (yield/2.0 collegiate formula-class racecar benchmark suspension); (R2) under LC2 peak combined, peak stress 335 MPa (yield/1.5 peak transient); (R3) under LC3 curb strike, peak stress 335 MPa; (R4) fatigue: 10^7 cycles LC1 stress range 40% peak, local range at any fillet must not exceed 159 MPa; (R5) first six natural frequencies (empty upright) must exceed 400 Hz to avoid suspension wind-up excitation; (R6) upright mass must not exceed 0.95 kg; (R7) maximum lateral deflection at the bearing bore under LC1 must not exceed 0.4 mm to preserve camber stiffness (target ratio: camber stiffness > 5 kN-m per deg). Thermal, fluid, buckling, and radiation analyses are not required. Deliver STEP AP242 and Parasolid plus report.
short_prompt:
Design a monolithic 7075-T6 aluminum front-left steering upright (knuckle) for a collegiate formula-class racecar (FS 2026 base + FSEast 2026 Hungaroring high-speed slick-tire format). The upright is billet-machined from a single 7075-T6 part with a central 60 mm wheel-bearing bore, upper and lower A-arm ball-joint bosses (defining 17.5-degree kingpin inclination and 8 mm trail), a forward steering-arm boss, and two integral caliper-mounting tabs for a 4-pot 102 mm-spacing caliper. Apply yield/2.0 suspension SF and yield/1.5 peak-transient SF per collegiate formula-class practice.

Envelope: ~180 x 100 x 340 mm.

Load cases.
- LC1 sustained 2 g cornering (outboard wheel): 1608 N vertical, 1608 N lateral outboard, 482 N longitudinal braking at tire contact (2 g on 82 kg plus 0.6 g partial brake).
- LC2 peak brake + turn-in 2.5 g: 1608 N vertical, 2010 N lateral, 2010 N longitudinal.
- LC3 curb strike: 8 kN horizontal inboard at the wheel center, both ball joints reacted.
Also check a 10^7-cycle fatigue spectrum off LC1, first six natural frequencies above 400 Hz, and bearing-bore lateral deflection under LC1 below 0.4 mm (camber stiffness > 5 kN-m/deg).

prompt.title: FSEast 2026 front-left steering upright (7075-T6)
prompt.brief: Single-billet upright with integral ball-joint bosses + steering arm + brake caliper tabs; 60 mm bearing bore; FS Rules 2026 + FSEast.

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: yield/2.0 collegiate formula-class racecar benchmark suspension

eval_coverage: collegiate formula-class racecar benchmark 2.0 / 1.5 differentiated SF per load
